name: ◇○•Apocalypse RP•○◇
description:
An apocalypse role play, (rp) You can choose the way it goes and where you start. Who your with, or if you want to solo. Any drama you want? Go ahead and do it, there is literally no limitations.(probably) if you want a situation, I'll make it interesting.

If your not sure where to start, I'll give you some ideas: You wake up- in an abandoned building? Hospital, shack, basement, lab. Maybe you could base your story off of other existing ones: the last of us, the walking dead, project zomboid, and other different types of apocalypse shows or games, even books. It doesn't have to be zombies either, it could be a natural disaster, or the world could be ending? Maybe a large science experiment went wrong? How about the sun or moon exploded for some reason, idk.

Just make sure to try your best and everything is valid- (Maybe)- {I also took this photo :] }
creator: BeeSauce
